FILE: README.md
================================================
# Oracle Hospitality APIs

This repository stores REST API specifications and accompanying Postman collections for Oracle Hospitality APIs.

For more information see [Oracle Hospitality Integration Platform](https://www.oracle.com/hospitality/integration-platform/).

Want help getting started with OHIP?  Register for this free on demand webcast [Stepping Through the OHIP Journey](https://go.oracle.com/LP=105035?elqCampaignId=281803&src1=:ow:o:p:po:::&intcmp=BUMK201218P00049:ow:o:p:po).

Specifications for Oracle Hospitality REST APIs are held in the [rest-api-specs](rest-api-specs) folder while Postman collections are held in the [postman-collection](postman-collections) folder.

## Get Help

Ask questions on by sending us an email to <hospitality_apis_ww_grp@oracle.com>.

## Getting Started

- Learn how to [contribute](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- See [issues](https://github.com/oracle/hospitality-api-docs/issues) for issues you can help with.

## Contributing

This project welcomes contributions from the community. Before submitting a pull request, please [review our contribution guide](./CONTRIBUTING.md)

## Security

Please consult the [security guide](./SECURITY.md) for our responsible security vulnerability disclosure process

## License

This project and all content within is available under the [Universal Permissive License v 1.0](https://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl).

See [LICENSE](LICENSE.txt) for more details.

## Copyright

Copyright (c) 2021, 2026 Oracle and/or its affiliates.




================================================
FILE: CONTRIBUTING.md
================================================
# Contributing to this repository

We welcome your contributions! There are multiple ways to contribute.

## Opening issues

For bugs or enhancement requests, please file a GitHub issue unless it's
security related. When filing a bug remember that the better written the bug is,
the more likely it is to be fixed. If you think you've found a security
vulnerability, do not raise a GitHub issue and follow the instructions in our
[security policy](./SECURITY.md).

## Contributing code

We welcome your code contributions. Before submitting code via a pull request,
you will need to have signed the [Oracle Contributor Agreement][OCA] (OCA) and
your commits need to include the following line using the name and e-mail
address you used to sign the OCA:

```text
Signed-off-by: Your Name <you@example.org>
```

This can be automatically added to pull requests by committing with `--sign-off`
or `-s`, e.g.

```text
git commit --signoff
```

Only pull requests from committers that can be verified as having signed the OCA
can be accepted.

## Pull request process

1. Ensure there is an issue created to track and discuss the fix or enhancement
   you intend to submit.
1. Fork this repository.
1. Create a branch in your fork to implement the changes. We recommend using
   the issue number as part of your branch name, e.g. `1234-fixes`.
1. Ensure that any documentation is updated with the changes that are required
   by your change.
1. Ensure that any samples are updated if the base image has been changed.
1. Submit the pull request. *Do not leave the pull request blank*. Explain exactly
   what your changes are meant to do and provide simple steps on how to validate.
   your changes. Ensure that you reference the issue you created as well.
1. We will assign the pull request to 2-3 people for review before it is merged.

## Code of conduct

Follow the [Golden Rule](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Golden_Rule). If you'd
like more specific guidelines, see the [Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct][COC].

[OCA]: https://oca.opensource.oracle.com
[COC]: https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/1/4/code-of-conduct/

FILE: SECURITY.md
================================================
# Reporting security vulnerabilities

Oracle values the independent security research community and believes that
responsible disclosure of security vulnerabilities helps us ensure the security
and privacy of all our users.

Please do NOT raise a GitHub Issue to report a security vulnerability. If you
believe you have found a security vulnerability, please submit a report to
[secalert_us@oracle.com][1] preferably with a proof of concept. Please review
some additional information on [how to report security vulnerabilities to Oracle][2].
We encourage people who contact Oracle Security to use email encryption using
[our encryption key][3].

We ask that you do not use other channels or contact the project maintainers
directly.

Non-vulnerability related security issues including ideas for new or improved
security features are welcome on GitHub Issues.

## Security updates, alerts and bulletins

Security updates will be released on a regular cadence. Many of our projects
will typically release security fixes in conjunction with the
Oracle Critical Patch Update program. Additional
information, including past advisories, is available on our [security alerts][4]
page.

## Security-related information

We will provide security related information such as a threat model, considerations
for secure use, or any known security issues in our documentation. Please note
that labs and sample code are intended to demonstrate a concept and may not be
sufficiently hardened for production use.

[1]: mailto:secalert_us@oracle.com
[2]: https://www.oracle.com/corporate/security-practices/assurance/vulnerability/reporting.html
[3]: https://www.oracle.com/security-alerts/encryptionkey.html
[4]: https://www.oracle.com/security-alerts/

FILE: graphql/data-apis/base.graphql
================================================
# This is the base graphql schema which is used to build federated graph

directive @stream(if: Boolean, label: String, initialCount: Int = 0) on FIELD
scalar Date
scalar DateTime
input DateInput{
  _eq: Date
  _ne: Date
  _in: [Date]
  _nin: [Date]
  _gt: Date
  _lt: Date
  _gte: Date
  _lte: Date
  _btn: DateRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateRangeInput {
  start: Date!
  end: Date!
}
input DateTimeInput {
  _eq: DateTime
  _ne: DateTime
  _in: [DateTime]
  _nin: [DateTime]
  _gt: DateTime
  _lt: DateTime
  _gte: DateTime
  _lte: DateTime
  _btn: DateTimeRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateTimeRangeInput {
  start: DateTime!
  end: DateTime!
}
input StringInput {
  _eq: String
  _ne: String
  _in: [String]
  _nin: [String]
  _gt: String
  _lt: String
  _gte: String
  _lte: String
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input FloatInput {
  _eq: Float
  _ne: Float
  _in: [Float]
  _nin: [Float]
  _gt: Float
  _lt: Float
  _gte: Float
  _lte: Float
  _btn: FloatRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input FloatRangeInput {
  start: Float!
  end: Float!
}

FILE: graphql/data-apis/CateringEventForecast.graphql
================================================

# title : OPERA Cloud RnA CateringEventForecast GraphQL API,
# description : GraphQL API to cater for Event revenue forecast details for defined periods broken down by Event Type, Revenue Group and Revenue Type.
#               Compatible with OPERA Cloud RnA release 25.5.0.0.
#               This document and all content within is available under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 
#               (https://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl). Copyright (c) 2020,2026 Oracle and/or its affiliates
# version : 25.5.0.0
# termsOfService : https://www.oracle.com/legal/terms.html
# contact_email : hospitality_apis_ww_grp@oracle.com
# license : https://opensource.org/licenses/upl

directive @stream(if: Boolean, label: String, initialCount: Int = 0) on FIELD
directive @conditionalInputPair(pair: Int) on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @mandatoryInput on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
scalar Date
scalar DateTime

# Date format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
input DateInput{
  _eq: Date
  _ne: Date
  _in: [Date]
  _nin: [Date]
  _gt: Date
  _lt: Date
  _gte: Date
  _lte: Date
  _btn: DateRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateRangeInput {
  start: Date!
  end: Date!
}

# Datetime format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS"
input DateTimeInput {
  _eq: DateTime
  _ne: DateTime
  _in: [DateTime]
  _nin: [DateTime]
  _gt: DateTime
  _lt: DateTime
  _gte: DateTime
  _lte: DateTime
  _btn: DateTimeRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateTimeRangeInput {
  start: DateTime!
  end: DateTime!
}

input StringInput {
  _eq: String
  _ne: String
  _in: [String]
  _nin: [String]
  _gt: String
  _lt: String
  _gte: String
  _lte: String
  _isNull: Boolean
}

input FloatInput {
  _eq: Float
  _ne: Float
  _in: [Float]
  _nin: [Float]
  _gt: Float
  _lt: Float
  _gte: Float
  _lte: Float
  _btn: FloatRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input FloatRangeInput {
  start: Float!
  end: Float!
}

# Mandatory filters:
# The following filters are mandatory required filters. 
# Please ensure the request includes all the below fields. 
# 		 - eventtypeforecastDetailsEvType
# 		 - eventtypeforecastDetailsResort


input CateringEventForecastQueryArgumentsType {
  """Allotment Type attached to this event forecast record."""
  eventtypeforecastDetailsBookingType: StringInput
  """Central Booking Type"""
  eventtypeforecastDetailsRepBookingType: StringInput
  """Central Event Type"""
  eventtypeforecastDetailsRepEventType: StringInput
  """Central Market Code"""
  eventtypeforecastDetailsRepMarketCode: StringInput
  """DSI Internal Data Source ID to identify Opera Chain and instance"""
  eventtypeforecastDetailsDsi: FloatInput
  """EV_FORECAST_SEQNO"""
  eventtypeforecastDetailsEvForecastid: FloatInput
  """Event Type"""
  eventtypeforecastDetailsEvType: StringInput!                          @mandatoryInput
  """Eventtypeid"""
  eventtypeforecastDetailsEventtypeid: StringInput
  """Forecast Start Date"""
  eventtypeforecastDetailsFcBegin: DateInput
  """Forecast Enddate"""
  eventtypeforecastDetailsFcEnd: DateInput
  """Eventforecastid"""
  eventtypeforecastDetailsEventforecastid: FloatInput
  """JRN Update Date and Time"""
  eventtypeforecastDetailsJrnupdatedttm: DateTimeInput
  """Market Code"""
  eventtypeforecastDetailsMarketCode: StringInput
  """Internal ID to uniquely identify the Organization"""
  eventtypeforecastDetailsOrganizationid: FloatInput
  """Code to uniquely identify the Property"""
  eventtypeforecastDetailsResort: StringInput!                          @mandatoryInput
  """RnA Insertdate"""
  eventtypeforecastDetailsRnaInsertdate: DateTimeInput
  """RnA Updatedate"""
  eventtypeforecastDetailsRnaUpdatedate: DateTimeInput
  """Central Xchange Date"""
  eventforecastrevDetailsCXchangeDate: DateInput
  """DSI Internal Data Source ID to identify Opera Chain and instance"""
  eventforecastrevDetailsDsi: FloatInput
  """EV_FORECAST_SEQNO"""
  eventforecastrevDetailsEvForecastid: FloatInput
  """Eventforecastid"""
  eventforecastrevDetailsEventforecastid: FloatInput
  """Eventforecastrevenueid"""
  eventforecastrevDetailsEventforecastrevenueid: FloatInput
  """JRN Update Date and Time"""
  eventforecastrevDetailsJrnupdatedttm: DateTimeInput
  """Internal ID to uniquely identify the Property"""
  eventforecastrevDetailsLocationid: StringInput
  """Internal ID to uniquely identify the Organization"""
  eventforecastrevDetailsOrganizationid: FloatInput
  """Code to uniquely identify the Property"""
  eventforecastrevDetailsResort: StringInput
  """The property that the record belongs to"""
  resortDetailsResort: StringInput
  """Number format of AR account no."""
  resortDetailsArAcctNoFormat: StringInput
  """Specifies if the AR acct No is mandatory(Y/N)"""
  resortDetailsArAcctNoMandYn: StringInput
  """Default Account Type for an Agent for the Property"""
  resortDetailsArAgent: StringInput
  """Internal"""
  resortDetailsArBalTrxCode: StringInput
  """Default Account Type for a Company for the Property"""
  resortDetailsArCompany: StringInput
  """Internal"""
  resortDetailsArCreditTrxCode: StringInput
  """Default Account Type for a Group for the Property"""
  resortDetailsArGroups: StringInput
  """Default Account Type for Individual for the Property"""
  resortDetailsArIndividuals: StringInput
  """Internal"""
  resortDetailsArSettleCode: StringInput
  """Internal"""
  resortDetailsArTypewriter: StringInput
  """Access Code"""
  resortDetailsAccessCode: StringInput
  """Number of handicapped rooms."""
  resortDetailsQtyHandicappedRooms: FloatInput
  """Aging bucket 1"""
  resortDetailsAgingLevel1: FloatInput
  """Aging bucket 2"""
  resortDetailsAgingLevel2: FloatInput
  """Aging bucket 3"""
  resortDetailsAgingLevel3: FloatInput
  """Aging bucket 4"""
  resortDetailsAgingLevel4: FloatInput
  """Aging bucket 3"""
  resortDetailsAgingLevel5: FloatInput
  """The Airport Code for the airport near the property"""
  resortDetailsAirport: StringInput
  """Distance of the Airport specified in the AIRPORT_CODE column from the Property"""
  resortDetailsAirportDistance: StringInput
  """Time it takes to travel the distance between the Property and the Airport specified in AIRPORT_CODE column"""
  resortDetailsAirportTime: StringInput
  """Allow loggin in to this resort(Y/N)"""
  resortDetailsAllowLoginYn: StringInput
  """Period for the allowance"""
  resortDetailsAllowancePeriodAdj: StringInput
  """Internal"""
  resortDetailsAwardsTimeout: FloatInput
  """Ball Room Area"""
  resortDetailsBrArea: StringInput
  """No of Ballroom Seats"""
  resortDetailsBrSeats: FloatInput
  """The base language of the Hotel"""
  resortDetailsBaseLanguage: StringInput
  """It contains the reservation type to be used when making group block"""
  resortDetailsBlock: StringInput
  """Brand Code of the property."""
  resortDetailsBrandCode: StringInput
  """Financial Year of the Property"""
  resortDetailsBudgetMonth: FloatInput
  """The date this resort becomes valid for use by the system"""
  resortDetailsBeginDate: DateInput
  """Value for the parameter."""
  resortDetailsBusinessId: StringInput
  """Value for the parameter."""
  resortDetailsBusinessRegCode: StringInput
  """Code for the CRO"""
  resortDetailsCroCode: StringInput
  """Internal"""
  resortDetailsCashShiftDrop: StringInput
  """Catering Currency Code used when Catering Currency differs from base currency."""
  resortDetailsCateringCurrencyCode: StringInput

  resortDetailsCateringCurrencyFormat: StringInput
  """Central  Exchange Date"""
  resortDetailsCXchangeDate: DateInput

  resortDetailsCXchangeRate: FloatInput

  resortDetailsRepPasserbySource: StringInput
  """Central Property Type"""
  resortDetailsRepResortType: StringInput
  """Central Sgl Rate1"""
  resortDetailsCSglRate1: FloatInput
  """Central Sgl Rate 2"""
  resortDetailsCSglRate2: FloatInput

type Query {
  """Event revenue forecast details for defined periods broken down by Event Type Revenue Group and Revenue Type."""
  cateringEventForecast(limit: Int offset: Int input: CateringEventForecastQueryArgumentsType!): [CateringEventForecastType]
}

# title : OPERA Cloud RnA CateringEventStatusChanges GraphQL API,
# description : GraphQL API to cater for Detailed information on the status changes throughout the production period of an event, including the new and old status codes, change date, revenue and attendees. .
#               Compatible with OPERA Cloud RnA release 25.5.0.0.
#               This document and all content within is available under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 
#               (https://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl). Copyright (c) 2020,2026 Oracle and/or its affiliates
# version : 25.5.0.0
# termsOfService : https://www.oracle.com/legal/terms.html
# contact_email : hospitality_apis_ww_grp@oracle.com
# license : https://opensource.org/licenses/upl

directive @stream(if: Boolean, label: String, initialCount: Int = 0) on FIELD
directive @conditionalInputPair(pair: Int) on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @mandatoryInput on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
scalar Date
scalar DateTime

# Date format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
input DateInput{
  _eq: Date
  _ne: Date
  _in: [Date]
  _nin: [Date]
  _gt: Date
  _lt: Date
  _gte: Date
  _lte: Date
  _btn: DateRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateRangeInput {
  start: Date!
  end: Date!
}

# Datetime format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS"
input DateTimeInput {
  _eq: DateTime
  _ne: DateTime
  _in: [DateTime]
  _nin: [DateTime]
  _gt: DateTime
  _lt: DateTime
  _gte: DateTime
  _lte: DateTime
  _btn: DateTimeRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateTimeRangeInput {
  start: DateTime!
  end: DateTime!
}

input StringInput {
  _eq: String
  _ne: String
  _in: [String]
  _nin: [String]
  _gt: String
  _lt: String
  _gte: String
  _lte: String
  _isNull: Boolean
}

input FloatInput {
  _eq: Float
  _ne: Float
  _in: [Float]
  _nin: [Float]
  _gt: Float
  _lt: Float
  _gte: Float
  _lte: Float
  _btn: FloatRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input FloatRangeInput {
  start: Float!
  end: Float!
}

directive @stream(if: Boolean, label: String, initialCount: Int = 0) on FIELD
directive @conditionalInputPair(pair: Int) on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION

scalar Date
scalar DateTime

  _eq: Date
  _ne: Date

  _lt: Date

  _lte: Date

type Query {
  """Provides detailed information of all configured external codes/values (i.e. general ledger codes) mapped to codes used in OPERA (i.e transaction codes market codes). It contains a comprehensive set of data including but not limited to Mapping Type Code/Descriptions Mapped To Code/Descriptions with other Mapping details such as Export Values by Property / Chain."""
  exportMappings(limit: Int offset: Int input: ExportMappingsQueryArgumentsType!): [ExportMappingsType]
}

================================================
FILE: graphql/data-apis/IntegrationConfigurations.graphql
================================================

# title : OPERA Cloud RnA IntegrationConfigurations GraphQL API,
# description : GraphQL API to cater for Exchange Configurations data including External Systems, External Databases, Business Events, Interface Setup, Interface Controls and Interface Mappings.
#               Compatible with OPERA Cloud RnA release 25.5.0.0.
#               This document and all content within is available under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 
#               (https://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl). Copyright (c) 2020,2026 Oracle and/or its affiliates
# version : 25.5.0.0
# termsOfService : https://www.oracle.com/legal/terms.html
# contact_email : hospitality_apis_ww_grp@oracle.com
# license : https://opensource.org/licenses/upl

directive @stream(if: Boolean, label: String, initialCount: Int = 0) on FIELD
directive @conditionalInputPair(pair: Int) on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @mandatoryInput on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
scalar Date
scalar DateTime

# Date format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
input DateInput{
  _eq: Date
  _ne: Date
  _in: [Date]
  _nin: [Date]
  _gt: Date
  _lt: Date
  _gte: Date
  _lte: Date
  _btn: DateRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateRangeInput {
  start: Date!
  end: Date!
}

# Datetime format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS"
input DateTimeInput {
  _eq: DateTime
  _ne: DateTime
  _in: [DateTime]
  _nin: [DateTime]
  _gt: DateTime
  _lt: DateTime
  _gte: DateTime
  _lte: DateTime
  _btn: DateTimeRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateTimeRangeInput {
  start: DateTime!
  end: DateTime!
}

input StringInput {
  _eq: String
  _ne: String
  _in: [String]
  _nin: [String]
  _gt: String
  _lt: String
  _gte: String
  _lte: String
  _isNull: Boolean
}

input FloatInput {
  _eq: Float
  _ne: Float
  _in: [Float]
  _nin: [Float]
  _gt: Float
  _lt: Float
  _gte: Float
  _lte: Float
  _btn: FloatRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input FloatRangeInput {
  start: Float!
  end: Float!
}

# Mandatory filters:
# The following filters are mandatory required filters. 
# Please ensure the request includes all the below fields. 
# 		 - extsysresortdetailsEsCode


input IntegrationConfigurationsQueryArgumentsType {
  """Consumer Name"""
  extsysresortdetailsConsumerName: StringInput
  """DSI"""
  extsysresortdetailsDsi: FloatInput
  """DSI"""
  extsysresortdetailsEsDsi: FloatInput
  """External System"""
  extsysresortdetailsCode: StringInput
  """External System"""
  extsysresortdetailsEsCode: StringInput!                               @mandatoryInput
  """External URI"""
  extsysresortdetailsExternalUri: StringInput
  """Inactive Date"""
  extsysresortdetailsInactiveDate: DateInput
  """JRN Update Date and Time"""
  extsysresortdetailsJrnUpdateDttm: DateTimeInput
  """JRN Update Date and Time"""
  extsysresortdetailsEsJrnUpdateDttm: DateTimeInput
  """Organization ID"""
  extsysresortdetailsOrganizationid: FloatInput
  """Organization ID"""

# title : OPERA Cloud RnA InventoryHousekeepingManagementTaskSheet GraphQL API,
# description : GraphQL API to cater for Details on Tasks, Task Sheets and Credits for the current date.
#               Compatible with OPERA Cloud RnA release 25.5.0.0.

#               (https://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl). Copyright (c) 2020,2026 Oracle and/or its affiliates
# version : 25.5.0.0
# termsOfService : https://www.oracle.com/legal/terms.html
# contact_email : hospitality_apis_ww_grp@oracle.com
# license : https://opensource.org/licenses/upl

directive @stream(if: Boolean, label: String, initialCount: Int = 0) on FIELD
directive @conditionalInputPair(pair: Int) on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @mandatoryInput on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
scalar Date
scalar DateTime

# Date format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
input DateInput{
  _eq: Date
  _ne: Date
  _in: [Date]
  _nin: [Date]
  _gt: Date
  _lt: Date
  _gte: Date
  _lte: Date
  _btn: DateRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateRangeInput {
  start: Date!
  end: Date!
}

# Datetime format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS"
input DateTimeInput {
  _eq: DateTime
  _ne: DateTime
  _in: [DateTime]
  _nin: [DateTime]
  _gt: DateTime
  _lt: DateTime
  _gte: DateTime
  _lte: DateTime
  _btn: DateTimeRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateTimeRangeInput {
  start: DateTime!
  end: DateTime!
}

input StringInput {
  _eq: String
  _ne: String
  _in: [String]
  _nin: [String]
  _gt: String
  _lt: String
  _gte: String
  _lte: String
  _isNull: Boolean
}

input FloatInput {
  _eq: Float
  _ne: Float
  _in: [Float]
  _nin: [Float]
  _gt: Float
  _lt: Float
  _gte: Float
  _lte: Float
  _btn: FloatRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input FloatRangeInput {
  start: Float!
  end: Float!
}

  tollFree: String

  translateMulticharYN: String

  turnawayCode: String

  twinRooms: Float

  updateDate: DateTime

# title : OPERA Cloud RnA ProfilesAddresses GraphQL API,
# description : GraphQL API to cater for All associated addresses including primary and secondary addresses, and address types which can be associated with the proper profile and profile type.
#               Compatible with OPERA Cloud RnA release 25.5.0.0.
#               This document and all content within is available under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 
#               (https://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl). Copyright (c) 2020,2026 Oracle and/or its affiliates
# version : 25.5.0.0
# termsOfService : https://www.oracle.com/legal/terms.html
# contact_email : hospitality_apis_ww_grp@oracle.com
# license : https://opensource.org/licenses/upl

directive @stream(if: Boolean, label: String, initialCount: Int = 0) on FIELD
directive @conditionalInputPair(pair: Int) on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @mandatoryInput on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
scalar Date
scalar DateTime

# Date format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
input DateInput{
  _eq: Date
  _ne: Date
  _in: [Date]
  _nin: [Date]
  _gt: Date
  _lt: Date
  _gte: Date
  _lte: Date
  _btn: DateRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateRangeInput {
  start: Date!
  end: Date!
}

# Datetime format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS"
input DateTimeInput {
  _eq: DateTime
  _ne: DateTime
  _in: [DateTime]
  _nin: [DateTime]
  _gt: DateTime
  _lt: DateTime
  _gte: DateTime
  _lte: DateTime
  _btn: DateTimeRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateTimeRangeInput {
  start: DateTime!
  end: DateTime!
}

input StringInput {
  _eq: String
  _ne: String
  _in: [String]
  _nin: [String]
  _gt: String
  _lt: String
  _gte: String
  _lte: String
  _isNull: Boolean
}

input FloatInput {
  _eq: Float
  _ne: Float
  _in: [Float]
  _nin: [Float]
  _gt: Float
  _lt: Float
  _gte: Float
  _lte: Float
  _btn: FloatRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input FloatRangeInput {
  start: Float!
  end: Float!
}

# title : OPERA Cloud RnA ProfilesCommunications GraphQL API,
# description : GraphQL API to cater for All associated communication details including communication types and roles, which can be associated with the proper profile and profile type. .
#               Compatible with OPERA Cloud RnA release 25.5.0.0.
#               This document and all content within is available under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 
#               (https://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl). Copyright (c) 2020,2026 Oracle and/or its affiliates
# version : 25.5.0.0
# termsOfService : https://www.oracle.com/legal/terms.html
# contact_email : hospitality_apis_ww_grp@oracle.com
# license : https://opensource.org/licenses/upl

directive @stream(if: Boolean, label: String, initialCount: Int = 0) on FIELD
directive @conditionalInputPair(pair: Int) on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @mandatoryInput on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
scalar Date
scalar DateTime

# Date format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
input DateInput{
  _eq: Date
  _ne: Date
  _in: [Date]
  _nin: [Date]
  _gt: Date
  _lt: Date
  _gte: Date
  _lte: Date
  _btn: DateRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateRangeInput {
  start: Date!
  end: Date!
}

# Datetime format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS"
input DateTimeInput {
  _eq: DateTime
  _ne: DateTime
  _in: [DateTime]
  _nin: [DateTime]
  _gt: DateTime
  _lt: DateTime
  _gte: DateTime
  _lte: DateTime
  _btn: DateTimeRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateTimeRangeInput {
  start: DateTime!
  end: DateTime!
}

input StringInput {
  _eq: String
  _ne: String
  _in: [String]
  _nin: [String]
  _gt: String
  _lt: String
  _gte: String
  _lte: String
  _isNull: Boolean
}

input FloatInput {
  _eq: Float
  _ne: Float
  _in: [Float]
  _nin: [Float]
  _gt: Float
  _lt: Float
  _gte: Float
  _lte: Float
  _btn: FloatRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input FloatRangeInput {
  start: Float!
  end: Float!
}

type Query {
  """All associated communication details including communication types and roles which can be associated with the proper profile and profile type."""
  profilesCommunications(limit: Int offset: Int input: ProfilesCommunicationsQueryArgumentsType!): [ProfilesCommunicationsType]

  uDFN40: Float

# title : OPERA Cloud RnA ProfilesLoyalty GraphQL API,
# description : GraphQL API to cater for Detailed information on the Loyalty Program providing details on the Membership, Profiles, Stay Information and the ability to  track Awards and Claims.
#               Compatible with OPERA Cloud RnA release 25.5.0.0.
#               This document and all content within is available under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 
#               (https://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl). Copyright (c) 2020,2026 Oracle and/or its affiliates
# version : 25.5.0.0
# termsOfService : https://www.oracle.com/legal/terms.html
# contact_email : hospitality_apis_ww_grp@oracle.com
# license : https://opensource.org/licenses/upl

directive @stream(if: Boolean, label: String, initialCount: Int = 0) on FIELD
directive @conditionalInputPair(pair: Int) on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @mandatoryInput on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
scalar Date
scalar DateTime

# Date format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
input DateInput{
  _eq: Date
  _ne: Date
  _in: [Date]
  _nin: [Date]
  _gt: Date
  _lt: Date
  _gte: Date
  _lte: Date
  _btn: DateRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateRangeInput {
  start: Date!
  end: Date!
}

# Datetime format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS"
input DateTimeInput {
  _eq: DateTime
  _ne: DateTime
  _in: [DateTime]
  _nin: [DateTime]
  _gt: DateTime
  _lt: DateTime
  _gte: DateTime
  _lte: DateTime
  _btn: DateTimeRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateTimeRangeInput {
  start: DateTime!
  end: DateTime!
}

input StringInput {
  _eq: String
  _ne: String
  _in: [String]
  _nin: [String]
  _gt: String
  _lt: String
  _gte: String
  _lte: String
  _isNull: Boolean
}

input FloatInput {
  _eq: Float
  _ne: Float
  _in: [Float]
  _nin: [Float]
  _gt: Float
  _lt: Float
  _gte: Float
  _lte: Float
  _btn: FloatRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input FloatRangeInput {
  start: Float!
  end: Float!
}

FILE: graphql/data-apis/ProfilesNotes.graphql

# title : OPERA Cloud RnA ProfilesNotes GraphQL API,
# description : GraphQL API to cater for Profile note types and note details, including internal and confidential flags, and the profile details they are associated with.
#               Compatible with OPERA Cloud RnA release 25.5.0.0.
#               This document and all content within is available under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 
#               (https://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl). Copyright (c) 2020,2026 Oracle and/or its affiliates
# version : 25.5.0.0
# termsOfService : https://www.oracle.com/legal/terms.html
# contact_email : hospitality_apis_ww_grp@oracle.com
# license : https://opensource.org/licenses/upl

directive @stream(if: Boolean, label: String, initialCount: Int = 0) on FIELD
directive @conditionalInputPair(pair: Int) on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @mandatoryInput on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
scalar Date
scalar DateTime

# Date format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
input DateInput{
  _eq: Date
  _ne: Date
  _in: [Date]
  _nin: [Date]
  _gt: Date
  _lt: Date
  _gte: Date
  _lte: Date
  _btn: DateRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateRangeInput {
  start: Date!
  end: Date!
}

# Datetime format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS"
input DateTimeInput {
  _eq: DateTime
  _ne: DateTime
  _in: [DateTime]
  _nin: [DateTime]
  _gt: DateTime
  _lt: DateTime
  _gte: DateTime
  _lte: DateTime
  _btn: DateTimeRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateTimeRangeInput {
  start: DateTime!
  end: DateTime!
}

input StringInput {
  _eq: String
  _ne: String
  _in: [String]
  _nin: [String]
  _gt: String
  _lt: String
  _gte: String
  _lte: String
  _isNull: Boolean
}

input FloatInput {
  _eq: Float
  _ne: Float
  _in: [Float]
  _nin: [Float]
  _gt: Float
  _lt: Float
  _gte: Float
  _lte: Float
  _btn: FloatRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input FloatRangeInput {
  start: Float!
  end: Float!
}

type Query {
  """Profile note types and note details including internal and confidential flags and the profile details they are associated with."""
  profilesNotes(limit: Int offset: Int input: ProfilesNotesQueryArgumentsType!): [ProfilesNotesType]
}
type ProfilesNotesType {
  """Profile Note Details"""
  profileNoteDetails: ProfilesNotesProfileNoteDetailsType
  """Profile All Details"""
  profileAllInformationDetails: ProfilesNotesProfileAllInformationDetailsType
  profilesNotesRecordCount: Int
}
type ProfilesNotesProfileNoteDetailsType {
  """Activity Due Date"""
  activityDueDate: Date
  """Activity Type"""
  activityType: String
  """ASP chain code."""
  chainCode: String
  """Indicates if this note is confidential."""
  confidentialYN: String
  """The user that created the record"""

type Query {
  """Property definition with marketing financial and housekeeping details."""
  property(limit: Int offset: Int input: PropertyQueryArgumentsType!): [PropertyType]
}

  """Resort Details"""
  propertyPropertyDetails: PropertyPropertyPropertyDetailsType
  """Transportation Details"""
  transportationTransportationDetails: PropertyTransportationTransportationDetailsType
  propertyRecordCount: Int
}

  """Type of distance to the transportation"""
  distanceType: String
  """Inactive Flag"""
  inactiveflag: String
  """The date the record was created"""
  insertDate: DateTime
  """The user that created the record"""
  insertUser: Float
  """JRN Update Date"""
  jRNUpdateDate: Date
  """JRN Update Date and Time"""
  jRNUpdateDateAndTime: DateTime
  """Single Character Identification for Transport to refer from Airport setup."""
  label: String
  """The property that the record belongs to"""
  locationID: String
  """Comments for the transportation"""
  notes: String
  """Display sequence"""
  orderBy: Float
  """Internal ID to uniquely identify the Organization"""
  organizationID: Float
  """Phone number to contact the transporation"""
  phone: String
  """Price range of the transportation"""
  priceRange: String
  """Internal Primary Key ID to uniquely identify the row"""
  primaryKeyID: Float
  """The property that the record belongs to"""
  property: String
  """RnA Insertdate"""
  rNAInsertDate: DateTime
  """RnA Updatedate"""
  rNAUpdateDate: DateTime
  """Indicates whether to show a lamp for reservations with this arrival method."""
  showLampYN: String
  """Code of the transportation"""
  transportID: String
  """The date the record was modified"""
  updateDate: DateTime
  """The user that modified the record"""
  updateUser: Float
  """Identifies the website URL of the transportation provider."""
  website: String
}

directive @stream(if: Boolean, label: String, initialCount: Int = 0) on FIELD
directive @conditionalInputPair(pair: Int) on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @mandatoryInput on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
scalar Date
scalar DateTime

# Date format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
input DateInput{
  _eq: Date
  _ne: Date
  _in: [Date]
  _nin: [Date]
  _gt: Date
  _lt: Date
  _gte: Date
  _lte: Date
  _btn: DateRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateRangeInput {
  start: Date!
  end: Date!
}

# Datetime format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS"
input DateTimeInput {
  _eq: DateTime
  _ne: DateTime
  _in: [DateTime]
  _nin: [DateTime]
  _gt: DateTime
  _lt: DateTime
  _gte: DateTime
  _lte: DateTime
  _btn: DateTimeRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateTimeRangeInput {
  start: DateTime!
  end: DateTime!
}

input StringInput {
  _eq: String
  _ne: String
  _in: [String]
  _nin: [String]
  _gt: String
  _lt: String
  _gte: String
  _lte: String
  _isNull: Boolean
}

input FloatInput {
  _eq: Float
  _ne: Float
  _in: [Float]
  _nin: [Float]
  _gt: Float
  _lt: Float
  _gte: Float
  _lte: Float
  _btn: FloatRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}

}

type Query {
  """Rate bucket definition."""
  ratesBuckets(limit: Int offset: Int input: RatesBucketsQueryArgumentsType!): [RatesBucketsType]
}

================================================
FILE: graphql/data-apis/RatesCategories.graphql

# title : OPERA Cloud RnA RatesCategories GraphQL API,
# description : GraphQL API to cater for Rate category definition including begin and end date and rate class association.
#               Compatible with OPERA Cloud RnA release 25.5.0.0.
#               This document and all content within is available under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 
#               (https://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl). Copyright (c) 2020,2026 Oracle and/or its affiliates
# version : 25.5.0.0
# termsOfService : https://www.oracle.com/legal/terms.html
# contact_email : hospitality_apis_ww_grp@oracle.com
# license : https://opensource.org/licenses/upl

directive @stream(if: Boolean, label: String, initialCount: Int = 0) on FIELD
directive @conditionalInputPair(pair: Int) on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @mandatoryInput on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
scalar Date
scalar DateTime

# Date format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
input DateInput{
  _eq: Date
  _ne: Date
  _in: [Date]
  _nin: [Date]
  _gt: Date
  _lt: Date
  _gte: Date
  _lte: Date
  _btn: DateRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateRangeInput {
  start: Date!
  end: Date!
}

# Datetime format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS"
input DateTimeInput {
  _eq: DateTime
  _ne: DateTime
  _in: [DateTime]
  _nin: [DateTime]
  _gt: DateTime
  _lt: DateTime
  _gte: DateTime
  _lte: DateTime
  _btn: DateTimeRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateTimeRangeInput {
  start: DateTime!
  end: DateTime!
}

input StringInput {
  _eq: String
  _ne: String
  _in: [String]
  _nin: [String]
  _gt: String
  _lt: String
  _gte: String
  _lte: String
  _isNull: Boolean
}

input FloatInput {
  _eq: Float
  _ne: Float
  _in: [Float]
  _nin: [Float]
  _gt: Float
  _lt: Float
  _gte: Float
  _lte: Float
  _btn: FloatRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input FloatRangeInput {
  start: Float!
  end: Float!
}

type Query {
  """Rate category definition including begin and end date and rate class association."""
  ratesCategories(limit: Int offset: Int input: RatesCategoriesQueryArgumentsType!): [RatesCategoriesType]
}
type RatesCategoriesType {
  """Rate Categories Details"""
  rateCategoriesDetails: RatesCategoriesRateCategoriesDetailsType
  """Resort Details"""
  propertyPropertyDetails: RatesCategoriesPropertyPropertyDetailsType
  ratesCategoriesRecordCount: Int
}

  zeroInvPurDays: Float

# title : OPERA Cloud RnA RatesDepositAndCancellationRules GraphQL API,
# description : GraphQL API to cater for Deposit and cancellation rules schedules and details by date, rate code and days prior to arrival or after booking.
#               Compatible with OPERA Cloud RnA release 25.5.0.0.
#               This document and all content within is available under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 
#               (https://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl). Copyright (c) 2020,2026 Oracle and/or its affiliates
# version : 25.5.0.0
# termsOfService : https://www.oracle.com/legal/terms.html
# contact_email : hospitality_apis_ww_grp@oracle.com
# license : https://opensource.org/licenses/upl

directive @stream(if: Boolean, label: String, initialCount: Int = 0) on FIELD
directive @conditionalInputPair(pair: Int) on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @mandatoryInput on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
scalar Date
scalar DateTime

# Date format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
input DateInput{
  _eq: Date
  _ne: Date
  _in: [Date]
  _nin: [Date]
  _gt: Date
  _lt: Date
  _gte: Date
  _lte: Date
  _btn: DateRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateRangeInput {
  start: Date!
  end: Date!
}

# Datetime format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS"
input DateTimeInput {
  _eq: DateTime
  _ne: DateTime
  _in: [DateTime]
  _nin: [DateTime]
  _gt: DateTime
  _lt: DateTime
  _gte: DateTime
  _lte: DateTime
  _btn: DateTimeRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateTimeRangeInput {
  start: DateTime!
  end: DateTime!
}

input StringInput {
  _eq: String
  _ne: String
  _in: [String]
  _nin: [String]
  _gt: String
  _lt: String
  _gte: String
  _lte: String
  _isNull: Boolean
}

input FloatInput {
  _eq: Float
  _ne: Float
  _in: [Float]
  _nin: [Float]
  _gt: Float
  _lt: Float
  _gte: Float
  _lte: Float
  _btn: FloatRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input FloatRangeInput {
  start: Float!
  end: Float!
}

type Query {
  """Deposit and cancellation rules schedules and details by date rate code and days prior to arrival or after booking."""
  ratesDepositAndCancellationRules(limit: Int offset: Int input: RatesDepositAndCancellationRulesQueryArgumentsType!): [RatesDepositAndCancellationRulesType]
}
type RatesDepositAndCancellationRulesType {
  """Rate Deposit Cancellation"""
  rateDepositCancellationDetails: RatesDepositAndCancellationRulesRateDepositCancellationDetailsType
  """Resort Details"""
  propertyPropertyDetails: RatesDepositAndCancellationRulesPropertyPropertyDetailsType
  ratesDepositAndCancellationRulesRecordCount: Int
}
type RatesDepositAndCancellationRulesRateDepositCancellationDetailsType {
  """Allotment Header ID"""
  allotmentHeaderId: Float
  """For Web Bookings only the deposit amount will be calculated either from room or catering revenue or from both. This column stores either: [ALL] [ROOMS] or [CATERING]."""
  applyRuleTo: String
  """Central Xchange Date"""
  cExchangeDate: Date
  """Central Xchange Rate"""
  cExchangeRate: Float
  """Cancellation Before Time"""
  cancellationBeforeTime: DateTime
  """Cancellation Days Prior To Arrival"""
  cancellationDaysPriorToArrival: Float

  cancellationPenaltyAmount: Float

  cancellationPenaltyAmountType: String
  """Central Cancellation Penalty Amount"""
  centralCancellationPenaltyAmount: Float
  """Central Deposit Amount"""
  centralDepositAmount: Float
  """Central Season Code"""
  centralSeasonCode: String
  """Credit Rating"""
  creditRating: String
  """DSI Internal Data Source ID to identify Opera Chain and instance"""
  dSI: Float
  """Day of week values as Y or N applicable for the cancel policies starting Sun to Sat."""
  daysofweek: String
  """Deleted Flag"""
  deletedflag: String

  depositAmount: Float

  depositDaysAfterBooking: Float

  depositDaysPriorToArrival: Float
  """Depositcancelruleid"""
  depositcancelruleid: Float
  """Deposit Cancel Rule PMS Reference"""
  depositcancelrulepmsref: Float
  """Depositor Cancellation Rule"""
  depositorCancellationRule: String
  """End Date"""
  endDate: Date
  """Internal date column."""
  fridayYN: String
  """Guarantee class for cancel policy. Specifically added for BWI."""
  guaranteeClass: String
  """Inactive Date"""
  inactiveDate: DateTime

  inactiveflag: String

  insertDate: DateTime
  """Insert User"""

FILE: graphql/data-apis/RatesHurdles.graphql

# title : OPERA Cloud RnA RatesHurdles GraphQL API,
# description : GraphQL API to cater for Rate yielding and hurdle information including date, amount , length of stay and room type.
#               Compatible with OPERA Cloud RnA release 25.5.0.0.
#               This document and all content within is available under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 
#               (https://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl). Copyright (c) 2020,2026 Oracle and/or its affiliates
# version : 25.5.0.0
# termsOfService : https://www.oracle.com/legal/terms.html
# contact_email : hospitality_apis_ww_grp@oracle.com
# license : https://opensource.org/licenses/upl

directive @stream(if: Boolean, label: String, initialCount: Int = 0) on FIELD
directive @conditionalInputPair(pair: Int) on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @mandatoryInput on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
scalar Date
scalar DateTime

# Date format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
input DateInput{
  _eq: Date
  _ne: Date
  _in: [Date]
  _nin: [Date]
  _gt: Date
  _lt: Date
  _gte: Date
  _lte: Date
  _btn: DateRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateRangeInput {
  start: Date!
  end: Date!
}

# Datetime format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS"
input DateTimeInput {
  _eq: DateTime
  _ne: DateTime
  _in: [DateTime]
  _nin: [DateTime]
  _gt: DateTime
  _lt: DateTime
  _gte: DateTime
  _lte: DateTime
  _btn: DateTimeRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateTimeRangeInput {
  start: DateTime!
  end: DateTime!
}

input StringInput {
  _eq: String
  _ne: String
  _in: [String]
  _nin: [String]
  _gt: String
  _lt: String
  _gte: String
  _lte: String
  _isNull: Boolean
}

input FloatInput {
  _eq: Float
  _ne: Float
  _in: [Float]
  _nin: [Float]
  _gt: Float
  _lt: Float
  _gte: Float
  _lte: Float
  _btn: FloatRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input FloatRangeInput {
  start: Float!
  end: Float!
}

type Query {
  """Rate yielding and hurdle information including date amount  length of stay and room type."""
  ratesHurdles(limit: Int offset: Int input: RatesHurdlesQueryArgumentsType!): [RatesHurdlesType]
}
type RatesHurdlesType {
  """Rate Hurdles Details"""
  rateHurdlesDetails: RatesHurdlesRateHurdlesDetailsType
  """Resort Details"""
  propertyPropertyDetails: RatesHurdlesPropertyPropertyDetailsType
  ratesHurdlesRecordCount: Int
}

# title : OPERA Cloud RnA RatesRateSeasons GraphQL API,
# description : GraphQL API to cater for Rate yielding and hurdle information including date, amount , length of stay and room type.
#               Compatible with OPERA Cloud RnA release 25.5.0.0.
#               This document and all content within is available under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 
#               (https://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl). Copyright (c) 2020,2026 Oracle and/or its affiliates
# version : 25.5.0.0
# termsOfService : https://www.oracle.com/legal/terms.html
# contact_email : hospitality_apis_ww_grp@oracle.com
# license : https://opensource.org/licenses/upl

directive @stream(if: Boolean, label: String, initialCount: Int = 0) on FIELD
directive @conditionalInputPair(pair: Int) on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @mandatoryInput on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
scalar Date
scalar DateTime

# Date format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
input DateInput{
  _eq: Date
  _ne: Date
  _in: [Date]
  _nin: [Date]
  _gt: Date
  _lt: Date
  _gte: Date
  _lte: Date
  _btn: DateRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateRangeInput {
  start: Date!
  end: Date!
}

# Datetime format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS"
input DateTimeInput {
  _eq: DateTime
  _ne: DateTime
  _in: [DateTime]
  _nin: [DateTime]
  _gt: DateTime
  _lt: DateTime
  _gte: DateTime
  _lte: DateTime
  _btn: DateTimeRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateTimeRangeInput {
  start: DateTime!
  end: DateTime!
}

input StringInput {
  _eq: String
  _ne: String
  _in: [String]
  _nin: [String]
  _gt: String
  _lt: String
  _gte: String
  _lte: String
  _isNull: Boolean
}

input FloatInput {
  _eq: Float
  _ne: Float
  _in: [Float]
  _nin: [Float]
  _gt: Float
  _lt: Float
  _gte: Float
  _lte: Float
  _btn: FloatRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input FloatRangeInput {
  start: Float!
  end: Float!
}

================================================
FILE: graphql/data-apis/RatesRestrictions.graphql
================================================

# title : OPERA Cloud RnA RatesRestrictions GraphQL API,
# description : GraphQL API to cater for Rate restriction definition including restriction type, date applied, room and rate code with day of the week and length of the stay details.
#               Compatible with OPERA Cloud RnA release 25.5.0.0.
#               This document and all content within is available under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 
#               (https://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl). Copyright (c) 2020,2026 Oracle and/or its affiliates
# version : 25.5.0.0
# termsOfService : https://www.oracle.com/legal/terms.html
# contact_email : hospitality_apis_ww_grp@oracle.com
# license : https://opensource.org/licenses/upl

directive @stream(if: Boolean, label: String, initialCount: Int = 0) on FIELD
directive @conditionalInputPair(pair: Int) on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @mandatoryInput on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
scalar Date
scalar DateTime

# Date format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
input DateInput{
  _eq: Date
  _ne: Date
  _in: [Date]
  _nin: [Date]
  _gt: Date
  _lt: Date
  _gte: Date
  _lte: Date
  _btn: DateRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateRangeInput {
  start: Date!
  end: Date!
}

# Datetime format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS"
input DateTimeInput {
  _eq: DateTime
  _ne: DateTime
  _in: [DateTime]
  _nin: [DateTime]
  _gt: DateTime
  _lt: DateTime
  _gte: DateTime
  _lte: DateTime
  _btn: DateTimeRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateTimeRangeInput {
  start: DateTime!
  end: DateTime!
}

input StringInput {
  _eq: String
  _ne: String
  _in: [String]
  _nin: [String]
  _gt: String
  _lt: String
  _gte: String
  _lte: String
  _isNull: Boolean
}

input FloatInput {
  _eq: Float
  _ne: Float
  _in: [Float]
  _nin: [Float]
  _gt: Float
  _lt: Float
  _gte: Float
  _lte: Float
  _btn: FloatRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input FloatRangeInput {
  start: Float!
  end: Float!
}

type Query {
  """Rate restriction definition including restriction type date applied room and rate code with day of the week and length of the stay details."""
  ratesRestrictions(limit: Int offset: Int input: RatesRestrictionsQueryArgumentsType!): [RatesRestrictionsType]
}
type RatesRestrictionsType {
  """Rate Restrictions Details"""
  rateRestrictionsDetails: RatesRestrictionsRateRestrictionsDetailsType
  """Resort Details"""
  propertyPropertyDetails: RatesRestrictionsPropertyPropertyDetailsType
  ratesRestrictionsRecordCount: Int
}

# title : OPERA Cloud RnA ResortBudgetForecast GraphQL API,
# description : GraphQL API to cater for This Subject Area Contains the Budget Forecast Details of the Property(s).
#               Compatible with OPERA Cloud RnA release 25.5.0.0.
#               This document and all content within is available under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 
#               (https://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl). Copyright (c) 2020,2026 Oracle and/or its affiliates
# version : 25.5.0.0
# termsOfService : https://www.oracle.com/legal/terms.html
# contact_email : hospitality_apis_ww_grp@oracle.com
# license : https://opensource.org/licenses/upl

directive @stream(if: Boolean, label: String, initialCount: Int = 0) on FIELD
directive @conditionalInputPair(pair: Int) on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @mandatoryInput on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
scalar Date
scalar DateTime

# Date format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
input DateInput{
  _eq: Date
  _ne: Date
  _in: [Date]
  _nin: [Date]
  _gt: Date
  _lt: Date
  _gte: Date
  _lte: Date
  _btn: DateRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateRangeInput {
  start: Date!
  end: Date!
}

# Datetime format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS"
input DateTimeInput {
  _eq: DateTime
  _ne: DateTime
  _in: [DateTime]
  _nin: [DateTime]
  _gt: DateTime
  _lt: DateTime
  _gte: DateTime
  _lte: DateTime
  _btn: DateTimeRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateTimeRangeInput {
  start: DateTime!
  end: DateTime!
}

input StringInput {
  _eq: String
  _ne: String
  _in: [String]
  _nin: [String]
  _gt: String
  _lt: String
  _gte: String
  _lte: String
  _isNull: Boolean
}

input FloatInput {
  _eq: Float
  _ne: Float
  _in: [Float]
  _nin: [Float]
  _gt: Float
  _lt: Float
  _gte: Float
  _lte: Float
  _btn: FloatRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input FloatRangeInput {
  start: Float!
  end: Float!
}

directive @stream(if: Boolean, label: String, initialCount: Int = 0) on FIELD
directive @conditionalInputPair(pair: Int) on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @mandatoryInput on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
scalar Date
scalar DateTime

# Date format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
input DateInput{
  _eq: Date
  _ne: Date
  _in: [Date]
  _nin: [Date]
  _gt: Date
  _lt: Date
  _gte: Date
  _lte: Date
  _btn: DateRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateRangeInput {
  start: Date!
  end: Date!
}

# Datetime format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS"
input DateTimeInput {
  _eq: DateTime
  _ne: DateTime
  _in: [DateTime]
  _nin: [DateTime]
  _gt: DateTime
  _lt: DateTime
  _gte: DateTime
  _lte: DateTime
  _btn: DateTimeRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateTimeRangeInput {
  start: DateTime!
  end: DateTime!
}

  _eq: String
  _ne: String
  _in: [String]
  _nin: [String]
  _gt: String
  _lt: String
  _gte: String
  _lte: String
  _isNull: Boolean
}

  _nin: [Float]

  _lt: Float
  _gte: Float

type Query {
  """Revenue group and type details."""
  revenueGroupsAndTypes(limit: Int offset: Int input: RevenueGroupsAndTypesQueryArgumentsType!): [RevenueGroupsAndTypesType]
}
type RevenueGroupsAndTypesType {
  """Revenue Group Types"""
  revenueGroupTypesDetails: RevenueGroupsAndTypesRevenueGroupTypesDetailsType
  """Resort Details"""
  propertyPropertyDetails: RevenueGroupsAndTypesPropertyPropertyDetailsType
  revenueGroupsAndTypesRecordCount: Int
}

  """Central Revenue Group"""

FILE: graphql/data-apis/RevenuePackages.graphql

# title : OPERA Cloud RnA RevenuePackages GraphQL API,
# description : GraphQL API to cater for Package header details including package group setup and associated flags for selling and consumption options.
#               Compatible with OPERA Cloud RnA release 25.5.0.0.
#               This document and all content within is available under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 
#               (https://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl). Copyright (c) 2020,2026 Oracle and/or its affiliates
# version : 25.5.0.0
# termsOfService : https://www.oracle.com/legal/terms.html
# contact_email : hospitality_apis_ww_grp@oracle.com
# license : https://opensource.org/licenses/upl

directive @stream(if: Boolean, label: String, initialCount: Int = 0) on FIELD
directive @conditionalInputPair(pair: Int) on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @mandatoryInput on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
scalar Date
scalar DateTime

# Date format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
input DateInput{
  _eq: Date
  _ne: Date
  _in: [Date]
  _nin: [Date]
  _gt: Date
  _lt: Date
  _gte: Date
  _lte: Date
  _btn: DateRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateRangeInput {
  start: Date!
  end: Date!
}

# Datetime format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS"
input DateTimeInput {
  _eq: DateTime
  _ne: DateTime
  _in: [DateTime]
  _nin: [DateTime]
  _gt: DateTime
  _lt: DateTime
  _gte: DateTime
  _lte: DateTime
  _btn: DateTimeRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateTimeRangeInput {
  start: DateTime!
  end: DateTime!
}

input StringInput {
  _eq: String
  _ne: String
  _in: [String]
  _nin: [String]
  _gt: String
  _lt: String
  _gte: String
  _lte: String
  _isNull: Boolean
}

input FloatInput {
  _eq: Float
  _ne: Float
  _in: [Float]
  _nin: [Float]
  _gt: Float
  _lt: Float
  _gte: Float
  _lte: Float
  _btn: FloatRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input FloatRangeInput {
  start: Float!
  end: Float!
}

type Query {
  """Package header details including package group setup and associated flags for selling and consumption options."""
  revenuePackages(limit: Int offset: Int input: RevenuePackagesQueryArgumentsType!): [RevenuePackagesType]
}
type RevenuePackagesType {
  """Revenue Packages Details"""
  revenuePackagesDetails: RevenuePackagesRevenuePackagesDetailsType
  """Resort Details"""
  propertyPropertyDetails: RevenuePackagesPropertyPropertyDetailsType
  revenuePackagesRecordCount: Int
}

# title : OPERA Cloud RnA SalesManagerGoals GraphQL API,
# description : GraphQL API to cater for The Sales Manager Goals subject Area enable the end users to retrieve information / create reports to compare the goals set for the Sales Managers against completed activities, and against statistical revenue data associated to profiles.
#               Compatible with OPERA Cloud RnA release 25.5.0.0.
#               This document and all content within is available under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 
#               (https://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl). Copyright (c) 2020,2026 Oracle and/or its affiliates
# version : 25.5.0.0
# termsOfService : https://www.oracle.com/legal/terms.html
# contact_email : hospitality_apis_ww_grp@oracle.com
# license : https://opensource.org/licenses/upl

directive @stream(if: Boolean, label: String, initialCount: Int = 0) on FIELD
directive @conditionalInputPair(pair: Int) on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @mandatoryInput on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
scalar Date
scalar DateTime

# Date format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
input DateInput{
  _eq: Date
  _ne: Date
  _in: [Date]
  _nin: [Date]
  _gt: Date
  _lt: Date
  _gte: Date
  _lte: Date
  _btn: DateRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateRangeInput {
  start: Date!
  end: Date!
}

# Datetime format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS"
input DateTimeInput {
  _eq: DateTime
  _ne: DateTime
  _in: [DateTime]
  _nin: [DateTime]
  _gt: DateTime
  _lt: DateTime
  _gte: DateTime
  _lte: DateTime
  _btn: DateTimeRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateTimeRangeInput {
  start: DateTime!
  end: DateTime!
}

input StringInput {
  _eq: String
  _ne: String
  _in: [String]
  _nin: [String]
  _gt: String
  _lt: String
  _gte: String
  _lte: String
  _isNull: Boolean
}

input FloatInput {
  _eq: Float
  _ne: Float
  _in: [Float]
  _nin: [Float]
  _gt: Float
  _lt: Float
  _gte: Float
  _lte: Float
  _btn: FloatRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}

  start: Float!
  end: Float!
}

# title : OPERA Cloud RnA SimpleReportsActivities GraphQL API,
# description : GraphQL API to cater for The Simple Report Activities Subject Area simplifies creating and building adhoc reports, including the ability to create new reports.
#               Compatible with OPERA Cloud RnA release 25.5.0.0.
#               This document and all content within is available under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 
#               (https://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl). Copyright (c) 2020,2026 Oracle and/or its affiliates
# version : 25.5.0.0
# termsOfService : https://www.oracle.com/legal/terms.html
# contact_email : hospitality_apis_ww_grp@oracle.com
# license : https://opensource.org/licenses/upl

directive @stream(if: Boolean, label: String, initialCount: Int = 0) on FIELD
directive @conditionalInputPair(pair: Int) on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @mandatoryInput on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
scalar Date
scalar DateTime

# Date format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
input DateInput{
  _eq: Date
  _ne: Date
  _in: [Date]
  _nin: [Date]
  _gt: Date
  _lt: Date
  _gte: Date
  _lte: Date
  _btn: DateRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateRangeInput {
  start: Date!
  end: Date!
}

# Datetime format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS"
input DateTimeInput {
  _eq: DateTime
  _ne: DateTime
  _in: [DateTime]
  _nin: [DateTime]
  _gt: DateTime
  _lt: DateTime
  _gte: DateTime
  _lte: DateTime
  _btn: DateTimeRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateTimeRangeInput {
  start: DateTime!
  end: DateTime!
}

input StringInput {
  _eq: String
  _ne: String
  _in: [String]
  _nin: [String]
  _gt: String
  _lt: String
  _gte: String
  _lte: String
  _isNull: Boolean
}

input FloatInput {
  _eq: Float
  _ne: Float
  _in: [Float]
  _nin: [Float]
  _gt: Float
  _lt: Float
  _gte: Float
  _lte: Float
  _btn: FloatRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input FloatRangeInput {
  start: Float!
  end: Float!
}

================================================
FILE: graphql/data-apis/SimpleReportsEvents.graphql
================================================

# title : OPERA Cloud RnA SimpleReportsEvents GraphQL API,
# description : GraphQL API to cater for The Simple Reports Events Subject Area simplifies creating and building adhoc reports, including the ability to create new reports.
#               Compatible with OPERA Cloud RnA release 25.5.0.0.
#               This document and all content within is available under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 
#               (https://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl). Copyright (c) 2020,2026 Oracle and/or its affiliates
# version : 25.5.0.0
# termsOfService : https://www.oracle.com/legal/terms.html
# contact_email : hospitality_apis_ww_grp@oracle.com
# license : https://opensource.org/licenses/upl

directive @stream(if: Boolean, label: String, initialCount: Int = 0) on FIELD
directive @conditionalInputPair(pair: Int) on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @mandatoryInput on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
scalar Date
scalar DateTime

# Date format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
input DateInput{
  _eq: Date
  _ne: Date
  _in: [Date]
  _nin: [Date]
  _gt: Date
  _lt: Date
  _gte: Date
  _lte: Date
  _btn: DateRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateRangeInput {
  start: Date!
  end: Date!
}

# Datetime format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS"
input DateTimeInput {
  _eq: DateTime
  _ne: DateTime
  _in: [DateTime]
  _nin: [DateTime]
  _gt: DateTime
  _lt: DateTime
  _gte: DateTime
  _lte: DateTime
  _btn: DateTimeRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateTimeRangeInput {
  start: DateTime!
  end: DateTime!
}

input StringInput {
  _eq: String
  _ne: String
  _in: [String]
  _nin: [String]
  _gt: String
  _lt: String
  _gte: String
  _lte: String
  _isNull: Boolean
}

input FloatInput {
  _eq: Float
  _ne: Float
  _in: [Float]
  _nin: [Float]
  _gt: Float
  _lt: Float
  _gte: Float
  _lte: Float
  _btn: FloatRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input FloatRangeInput {
  start: Float!
  end: Float!
}

# Mandatory filters:
# The following filters are mandatory required filters. 
# Please ensure the request includes all the below fields. 
# 		 - sceventinfoDetailsEvResort
# 		 - sceventinfoDetailsEventEndDate
# 		 - sceventinfoDetailsEventStartDate


input SimpleReportsEventsQueryArgumentsType {
  """Book ID"""
  sceventinfoDetailsBookId: FloatInput
  """DSI Internal Data Source ID to identify Opera Chain and instance"""
  sceventinfoDetailsDsi: FloatInput
  """End Time"""
  sceventinfoDetailsEndTime: DateTimeInput
  """Event Property."""
  sceventinfoDetailsEvResort: StringInput!                              @mandatoryInput
  """Event End Date."""
  sceventinfoDetailsEventEndDate: DateInput!                            @mandatoryInput
  """Event ID"""
  sceventinfoDetailsEventId: StringInput
  """Event Start Date."""
  sceventinfoDetailsEventStartDate: DateInput!                          @mandatoryInput
  """Event Status"""
  sceventinfoDetailsEventStatus: StringInput
  """Event Type"""
  sceventinfoDetailsEventType: StringInput
  """JRN Update Date and Time"""
  sceventinfoDetailsJrnupdatedttm: DateTimeInput
  """Master Event ID"""
  sceventinfoDetailsMasterEventId: FloatInput
  """Internal ID to uniquely identify the Organization"""

type Query {
  """The Simple Reports Events Subject Area simplifies creating and building adhoc reports including the ability to create new reports"""
  simpleReportsEvents(limit: Int offset: Int input: SimpleReportsEventsQueryArgumentsType!): [SimpleReportsEventsType]
}

# title : OPERA Cloud RnA SimpleReportsProfileIndividuals GraphQL API,
# description : GraphQL API to cater for The Simple Reports Profile-Individuals Subject Area simplifies creating and building adhoc reports, including the ability to create new reports.
#               Compatible with OPERA Cloud RnA release 25.5.0.0.
#               This document and all content within is available under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 
#               (https://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl). Copyright (c) 2020,2026 Oracle and/or its affiliates
# version : 25.5.0.0
# termsOfService : https://www.oracle.com/legal/terms.html
# contact_email : hospitality_apis_ww_grp@oracle.com
# license : https://opensource.org/licenses/upl

directive @stream(if: Boolean, label: String, initialCount: Int = 0) on FIELD
directive @conditionalInputPair(pair: Int) on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @mandatoryInput on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
scalar Date
scalar DateTime

# Date format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
input DateInput{
  _eq: Date
  _ne: Date
  _in: [Date]
  _nin: [Date]
  _gt: Date
  _lt: Date
  _gte: Date
  _lte: Date
  _btn: DateRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateRangeInput {
  start: Date!
  end: Date!
}

# Datetime format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS"
input DateTimeInput {
  _eq: DateTime
  _ne: DateTime
  _in: [DateTime]
  _nin: [DateTime]
  _gt: DateTime
  _lt: DateTime
  _gte: DateTime
  _lte: DateTime
  _btn: DateTimeRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}
input DateTimeRangeInput {
  start: DateTime!
  end: DateTime!
}

input StringInput {
  _eq: String
  _ne: String
  _in: [String]
  _nin: [String]
  _gt: String
  _lt: String
  _gte: String
  _lte: String
  _isNull: Boolean
}

input FloatInput {
  _eq: Float
  _ne: Float
  _in: [Float]
  _nin: [Float]
  _gt: Float
  _lt: Float
  _gte: Float
  _lte: Float
  _btn: FloatRangeInput
  _isNull: Boolean
}

  start: Float!
  end: Float!
}

  <script src="https://unpkg.com/graphiql@2.4.4/graphiql.min.js"
    integrity="sha384-3Bty39kXmxJMPp4NJBsd6zHKfrbkpUnzEyP2VnRxgTMMYT6NvnHY5mS0t/demxvG" crossorigin="anonymous">
    </script>
  <script src="https://unpkg.com/graphql-ws@5.11.3/umd/graphql-ws.min.js"
    integrity="sha384-feJxEM01WQlyLaGAB0QL5DOUKuU09DpeEd/dDVEJnqL/Z4B0vqq5bMJ4DUIsM2Jz" crossorigin="anonymous">
    </script>
  <script src="https://static.oracle.com/cdn/jet/14.0.0/3rdparty/require/require.js"
    integrity="sha384-Z9JQUtAaWmYKd6d4DNdwKbqQjtvpcd4f/QmJSoaDxeRg4hWHtyyF6BwCsrnLcG1F"
    crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
  <script src="https://static.oracle.com/cdn/jet/14.0.0/default/js/bundles-config.js"
    integrity="sha384-qkNhWYAsO47cz4Q8ifRlj+8m5N2ItbFGXd0iwOf6Z/ET2Km39laeNPDCWNZbXz+u"
    crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
  <script type="text/javascript">
    require(['knockout', 'ojs/ojknockout', 'ojs/ojbutton', 'ojs/ojinputtext', 'ojs/ojlabel', 'ojs/ojformlayout'], (ko) => {

      let inputs = new function () {

        if (undefined !== localStorage.getItem("ohipAsyncUrl") || null !== localStorage.getItem("ohipAsyncUrl")) {
          this.urlInputValue = ko.observable(localStorage.getItem("ohipAsyncUrl"));
        } else {
          this.urlInputValue = ko.observable("");
        }
        if (undefined !== sessionStorage.getItem("ohipAsyncSocketKey") || null !== sessionStorage.getItem("ohipAsyncSocketKey")) {
          this.socketKeyInputValue = ko.observable(sessionStorage.getItem("ohipAsyncSocketKey"));
        } else {
          this.socketKeyInputValue = ko.observable("");
        }
        if (undefined !== sessionStorage.getItem("ohipAsyncApiKey") || null !== sessionStorage.getItem("ohipAsyncApiKey")) {
          this.apiKeyInputValue = ko.observable(sessionStorage.getItem("ohipAsyncApiKey"));
        } else {
          this.apiKeyInputValue = ko.observable("");
        }
        if (undefined !== sessionStorage.getItem("ohipAsyncAuthToken") || null !== sessionStorage.getItem("ohipAsyncAuthToken")) {
          this.authTokenInputValue = ko.observable(sessionStorage.getItem("ohipAsyncAuthToken"));
        } else {
          this.authTokenInputValue = ko.observable("");
        }

        this.generateHash = async (apiKey) => {
          const keyUint8 = new TextEncoder().encode(apiKey);
          const hashBuffer = await crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256', keyUint8);
          const hashArray = Array.from(new Uint8Array(hashBuffer));
          const hashHex = hashArray.map(b => b.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')).join('');
          return hashHex;
        }

        this.saveInputsAndStartConnection = () => {
          let url = this.urlInputValue();
          const authToken = this.authTokenInputValue();
          const apiKey = this.apiKeyInputValue();
          if (!url || !authToken || !apiKey) {
            alert("Please fill all text boxes");
          } else {

            if (url.indexOf("/subscriptions") !== -1) {
              url = url.substring(0, url.indexOf("/subscriptions"));
              this.urlInputValue(url);
            }

            if (url.endsWith("/")) {
              url = url.substring(0, url.length - 1);
              this.urlInputValue(url);
            }

            if (url.startsWith("ws:")) {
              url = url.replace("ws:", "wss:");
              this.urlInputValue(url);
            }

            if (url.startsWith("http:")) {
              url = url.replace("http:", "wss:");
              this.urlInputValue(url);
            }

            if (url.startsWith("https:")) {
              url = url.replace("https:", "wss:");
              this.urlInputValue(url);
            }

            localStorage.setItem("ohipAsyncUrl", url);
            sessionStorage.setItem("ohipAsyncApiKey", apiKey);
            sessionStorage.setItem("ohipAsyncAuthToken", authToken);

            this.generateHash(apiKey).then(socketKey => {
              sessionStorage.setItem("ohipAsyncSocketKey", socketKey);
              this.socketKeyInputValue(socketKey);
              this.verifyConnection();
            });

          }
        }

        this.clearInputs = () => {

          this.urlInputValue("");
          this.socketKeyInputValue("");
          this.authTokenInputValue("");
          this.apiKeyInputValue("");
          localStorage.removeItem("ohipAsyncUrl");
          sessionStorage.removeItem("ohipAsyncSocketKey");
          sessionStorage.removeItem("ohipAsyncApiKey");
          sessionStorage.removeItem("ohipAsyncAuthToken");
          const errorMessages = document.getElementById("errorMessage");
          errorMessages.innerText = "";
          errorMessages.style.display = "none";
        }

        this.verifyConnection = () => {

          const graphiQLWindow = document.getElementById("graphiql");
          graphiQLWindow.style.display = "none";
          const errorMessages = document.getElementById("errorMessage");
          errorMessages.style.display = "none";

          const ohipAsyncUrl = this.urlInputValue();
          const ohipAsyncSocketKey = this.socketKeyInputValue();
          const ohipAsyncApiKey = this.apiKeyInputValue();
          const ohipAsyncAuthToken = this.authTokenInputValue();

          if (!ohipAsyncUrl || !ohipAsyncSocketKey || !ohipAsyncApiKey || !ohipAsyncAuthToken) {
            alert("Please populate all fields");
            return;
          }

          let testWsDispose;

          const wsClientTest = graphqlWs.createClient({
            url: `${ohipAsyncUrl}/subscriptions?key=${ohipAsyncSocketKey}`,
            lazy: true,
            keepAlive: 10000,
            connectionParams: async () => {
              return {
                "Authorization": `Bearer ${ohipAsyncAuthToken}`,
                "x-app-key": `${ohipAsyncApiKey}`
              }
            },
            on: {
              connected: (socket) => {
                errorMessages.style.display = "none";
                graphiQLWindow.style.display = "block";
                if (testWsDispose) {
                  testWsDispose();
                  this.reloadGraphiql();
                } else {
                  wsClientTest.dispose().then(() => {
                    this.reloadGraphiql();
                  });
                }
              },
              error: (err) => {
                errorMessages.innerHTML = `<p class="errorText">Error: Unexpected server response: 400 - Incorrect key or URL</p>`;
                errorMessages.style.display = "block";
                graphiQLWindow.style.display = "none";
                if (testWsDispose) {
                  testWsDispose();
                } else {
                  wsClientTest.dispose();
                }
              },
              closed: (event) => {
                if (event.code === 4401) {
                  errorMessages.innerHTML = `<p class="errorText">4401 Error: Unauthorised - Invalid credentials - Invalid Auth Token / API Key credentials.</p>`;
                  errorMessages.style.display = "block";
                  graphiQLWindow.style.display = "none";
                  if (testWsDispose) {
                    testWsDispose();
                  } else {
                    wsClientTest.dispose();
                  }
                }
              }
            },
          });

          testWsDispose = wsClientTest.subscribe({
            "Authorization": `Bearer ${ohipAsyncAuthToken}`,
            "x-app-key": `${ohipAsyncApiKey}`
          }, {
            next: (data) => { },
            error: (err) => { },
            complete: () => { },
          });

        }

        this.reloadGraphiql = () => {

          let customError = {};

          const ohipAsyncUrl = this.urlInputValue();
          const ohipAsyncSocketKey = this.socketKeyInputValue();
          const ohipAsyncApiKey = this.apiKeyInputValue();
          const ohipAsyncAuthToken = this.authTokenInputValue();

          const wsClient = graphqlWs.createClient({
            url: `${ohipAsyncUrl}/subscriptions?key=${ohipAsyncSocketKey}`,
            lazy: true,
            keepAlive: 10000,
            connectionParams: async () => {
              return {
                "Authorization": `Bearer ${ohipAsyncAuthToken}`,
                "x-app-key": `${ohipAsyncApiKey}`
              }
            },
            on: {
              connected: () => {
                customError.message = "";
              },
              closed: (event) => {
                customError.message = `Socket closed with event ${event.code} ${event.reason}`;
                if (dispose) {
                  dispose();
                }
              }
            }
          });

          let dispose;

          function subscribe(payload) {
            let deferred = null;
            const pending = [];
            let throwMe = null,
              done = false;

            dispose = wsClient.subscribe(payload, {
              next: (data) => {
                pending.push(data);
                deferred?.resolve(false);
              },
              error: (err) => {
                if (err instanceof Error) {
                  throwMe = err;
                } else if (err instanceof CloseEvent) {
                  throwMe = new Error(
                    `Socket closed with event ${err.code} ${err.reason || ""
                      }`.trim()
                  );
                } else {
                  // GraphQLError[]
                  throwMe = new Error(err.map(({ message }) => message).join(", "));
                }
                deferred?.reject({
                  message: throwMe.message
                });
              },
              complete: () => {
                done = true;
                if (customError && customError.message) {
                  deferred?.reject(customError);
                } else {
                  deferred?.resolve(true);
                }
              },
            });

            return {
              [Symbol.asyncIterator]() {
                return this;
              },
              async next() {
                if (done) return { done: true, value: undefined };
                if (throwMe) throw throwMe;
                if (pending.length) return { value: pending.shift() };
                return (await new Promise(
                  (resolve, reject) => (deferred = { resolve, reject })
                ))
                  ? { done: true, value: undefined }
                  : { value: pending.shift() };
              },
              async return() {
                dispose();
                return { done: true, value: undefined };
              },
            };
          }

          ReactDOM.render(
            React.createElement(GraphiQL, {
              fetcher: subscribe,
              defaultVariableEditorOpen: false,
              docExplorerOpen: true,
              response:
                `{
    "greeting": "Welcome to the OHIP GraphiQL Tool!",
    "usefulLinks": {
        "overview": "https://docs.oracle.com/cd/F29336_01/doc.201/f27480/c_streaming_api.htm#OHIPU-StreamingAPIpush-17008E8A",
        "connection": "https://docs.oracle.com/cd/F29336_01/doc.201/f27480/t_connecting_to_the_streaming_api.htm#OHIPU-ConnectingToTheStreamingAPI-05AD62C3"
    }
}`,
              defaultQuery:
                `# Welcome to the OHIP GraphiQL Tool
#
# Auto Complete Reminder:  Ctrl-Space (or just start typing)
#
# Example Sandbox Subscription:
#
# subscription {
#   newEvent (input:{chainCode: "OHIPCN"}) {
#     metadata {
#       offset
#       uniqueEventId
#     }
#     moduleName
#     eventName
#     detail {
#       elementName
#       newValue
#       oldValue
#     }
#   }
# }
#
# Run the Query below to access useful OHIP resources
query {
	getHelp {
	overview
	configuration
	connection {
	  help
	  errors
	}
	events {
	  payload
	  replaying
	}
	slack
	email
  } 
}
        `
            }),
            document.getElementById('graphiql'),
          );
        }

      };
      ko.applyBindings(inputs);
    });
  </script>
</body>

</html>


================================================
FILE: postman-collections/README.md
================================================
# Postman Collections

This folder contains:

- [Postman collections](https://www.postman.com/collection/) with many different API call samples on how to perform different functional workflows (e.g. digital check-in and checkout)
- [Postman Environment](https://learning.postman.com/docs/sending-requests/managing-environments) defining the main environment variables required to use the postman collections against our Hospitality APIs.
- [Workflows](property/WORKFLOWS.md) document describing the different workflows supported in the  postman collections.

To understand these Postman collections register to watch this free on demand  [Understanding Apiary Documentation & Postman Collections](https://go.oracle.com/LP=105035?elqCampaignId=281803&src1=:ow:o:p:po:::&intcmp=BUMK201218P00049:ow:o:p:po) is available to watch on demand.

The Postman collections are now available in our [online Postman workspace](https://www.postman.com/hospitalityapis/workspace/oracle-hospitality-apis/overview).

## Get Help

Ask questions by sending us an email to <hospitality-integrations_ww@oracle.com>.

## Get Involved

- Learn how to [contribute](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- See [issues](https://github.com/oracle/hospitality-api-docs/issues) for issues you can help with.

## Reporting Security Vulnerabilities

Please do NOT raise a GitHub Issue to report a security vulnerability. Refer to [SECURITY](../SECURITY.md) for details on how to report security vulnerabilities.

## License

This project and all content within is available under the [Universal Permissive License v 1.0](https://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl).

See [LICENSE](../LICENSE.txt) for more details.

## Copyright

Copyright (c) 2021, 2026 Oracle and/or its affiliates.

FILE: postman-collections/distribution/README.md
================================================
# OPERA Cloud Distribution Postman collections

Oracle Hospitality OPERA Cloud Distribution enables hotels to communicate room availability, rates, and inventory (ARI) directly to hotel chains, brands, independents, and representation companies.

The Postman collections use the [oracle-hospitality-distribution Postman Environment](oracle-hospitality-distribution.postman_environment.json).

Click to [<img src="../run-in-postman.svg" alt="Run In Postman" style="width: 128px; height: 32px;">](https://www.postman.com/hospitalityapis/oracle-hospitality-apis/collection/46029196-4661be67-1bab-4feb-ae91-cfda866b80e9/3-distribution-rest-apis-by-module/fork?origin=tab).

This document and all content within is available under the [Universal Permissive License v 1.0](https://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl). Copyright (c) 2020, 2026 Oracle and/or its affiliates.
